name: com.psigenvision.playerlooptimers
description:
Purpose: Provide extensible self-managed timer solution that is centralized and hooked into the player loop.

Function: Injection of timers into the low level player loop (Update) via a TimerManager.

Note: Based on git-amend's own Improved Timers system.

samples.description: Implements countdown timers to custom radial bars created using Unity UI Toolkit to demonstrate the Player Loop Timers package.
